requirement_unresolved.description: True when the requirement still contains an unresolved manifest expression such as ${missing.version}.

requirement_resolution.description: Resolver tag explaining how requirement was determined, such as resolved, unresolved_property, unresolved_env, unresolved_parent, unresolved_profile_gated, or unresolved_missing.

dependency_type.description: Dependency phase. Scrutineer normalizes common aliases to runtime, dev, test, or build.
